summary: Batch Freight Classification feature fully tested. All 7 backend API tests pass (1 skipped - override doc not set). Frontend dialog verified with pre-run config (threshold slider, skip overrides, safety notice) and post-run results (summary cards, direction breakdown, GL distribution, expandable review/classified tables). Freight GL column in queue table shows direction badges and GL numbers.
critical_code_review_comments: BC Write Guard returns write_enabled=false, status='blocked' confirming production safety
Document 98695c83-a7f3-495f-ac8d-bb5405c55a63 does not have override flag set - the test expecting this was skipped
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 51 documents in queue
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch Freight Classification feature complete. Key endpoint: POST /api/freight-routing/batch-classify with params document_ids (optional), confidence_threshold (default 0.5), skip_overrides (default true). Returns summary with total_processed, freight_detected, non_freight, by_direction, by_gl_account, needs_manual_review, high_confidence. Frontend: 'Freight G/L' button (data-testid='batch-freight-btn') in Document Queue header opens BatchFreightClassifyDialog. Results show direction breakdown (inbound/outbound/transfer/unknown) and GL distribution. Queue table has 'Freight GL' column with direction badges and GL numbers.

POST /api/freight-routing/batch-classify.evidence: Processes all documents, returns total_processed=51, freight_detected=24, non_freight=27, by_direction counts

confidence_threshold parameter.evidence: Items below threshold appear in needs_manual_review, above in high_confidence

skip_overrides=true.evidence: Returns skipped_override count for docs with manual overrides

GET /api/bc/write-guard/status.evidence: write_enabled=false, status='blocked', environment='Production' - BC writes are BLOCKED

Frontend: Freight G/L button.evidence: Button with data-testid='batch-freight-btn' visible in Document Queue header

Frontend: BatchFreightClassifyDialog con.evidence: Dialog shows target count (33 docs), confidence slider (50%), skip overrides checkbox (checked), safety notice (read-only)

Frontend: Run Classification.evidence: data-testid='batch-freight-run-btn' triggers classification, results display after ~6s

Frontend: Results summary.evidence: Shows Processed (51), Freight Detected (24), Needs Review (20) summary cards

Frontend: Direction breakdown.evidence: Shows 4 Inbound, 0 Outbound, 0 Transfer, 20 Unknown with colored cards

Frontend: Items Requiring Manual Review.evidence: Expandable section with 20 items, shows document/vendor/direction/GL/confidence columns

Frontend: Freight GL column in queue tab.evidence: 'Freight GL' column header exists, 33 freight-gl cells with direction badges (inbound/unknown) and GL numbers (5200-00/5900-00)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live - freight routing writes to MongoDB only, BC write guard confirms BC writes are BLOCKED
